items.title: 'Fear of Flying Clinic' helps anxious travelers back into the skies
items.description: For 50 years, a San Francisco-based group has created a space where fearful flyers can get supported exposure to air travel.

items.title: 'Everything was in pieces:' Lindsey Vonn describes grueling surgery on broken leg
items.description: In a recent video, the Olympic skier credits her surgeon with saving her leg from potential amputation.
